# Generated by ollama (qwen2.5-coder_14b)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow that caches dependencies and build outputs to speed up the CI pipeline. Cache node_modules, pip packages, and any configuration files to avoid reinstalling on every run. Include environment-specific configs in the cache for convenience.
# Category: cicd_security

name: ci

on:
  push:
    branches:
      - main
  pull_request:
    branches:
      - main

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest

    strategy:
      matrix:
        node-version: [14, 16]
        python-version: [3.8, 3.9]

    steps:
    - uses: actions/checkout@v2

    # Setup Node.js
    - name: Set up Node.js ${{ matrix.node-version }}
      uses: actions/setup-node@v2
      with:
        node-version: ${{ matrix.node-version }}

    # Cache npm dependencies
    - name: Cache npm dependencies
      id: cache-npm
      uses: actions/cache@v2
      with:
        path: |
          **/node_modules
        key: ${{ runner.os }}-node-${{ hashFiles('**/package-lock.json') }}
        restore-keys: |
          ${{ runner.os }}-node-

    # Install npm dependencies if cache misses
    - name: Install npm dependencies
      if: steps.cache-npm.outputs.cache-hit != 'true'
      run: npm ci

    # Setup Python
    - name: Set up Python ${{ matrix.python-version }}
      uses: actions/setup-python@v2
      with:
        python-version: ${{ matrix.python-version }}

    # Cache pip dependencies
    - name: Cache pip dependencies
      id: cache-pip
      uses: actions/cache@v2
      with:
        path: |
          **/__pycache__
          **/*.egg-info
          venv/
        key: ${{ runner.os }}-python-${{ hashFiles('**/requirements.txt') }}
        restore-keys: |
          ${{ runner.os }}-python-

    # Install pip dependencies if cache misses
    - name: Install pip dependencies
      if: steps.cache-pip.outputs.cache-hit != 'true'
      run: python -m venv venv && source venv/bin/activate && pip install --no-cache-dir -r requirements.txt

    # Cache configuration files
    - name: Cache configuration files
      id: cache-configs
      uses: actions/cache@v2
      with:
        path: |
          .env.*
          config/*
        key: ${{ runner.os }}-config-${{ github.sha }}
        restore-keys: |
          ${{ runner.os }}-config-

    # Restore configuration files if needed
    - name: Restore configuration files
      if: steps.cache-configs.outputs.cache-hit != 'true'
      run: cp .env.example .env

    # Run build and tests
    - name: Build the project
      run: npm run build

    - name: Run tests
      run: npm test

    - name: Run Python tests
      if: matrix.python-version == '3.9'
      run: |
        source venv/bin/activate
        python -m unittest discover
